model_notes: Official World Cup fantasy prices are missing, so official_price is null for every row.
proxy_price_v0 is a conservative placeholder for testing value logic only.

Proxy price starts with a position base and adjusts for expected return, risk-adjusted return, per-90 upside, team quality, start probability, expected minutes, role confidence, country role, composite risk, tail risk, and substitution risk.
Value scores should be replaced or recalibrated when official fantasy prices are imported.

playerValueModel.name: Alban Lafont
playerValueModel.source_note: Prototype proxy value model. Official World Cup fantasy price is missing, so proxy price is an estimated placeholder and not an official price.

caveats: Proxy price is not an official FIFA or fantasy-game price.
Value rankings should be treated as prototype only until official prices are imported.
Proxy price uses available performance, role, team quality, and risk signals; it may not match future game pricing.
